title: ChallengeAdvancements
description: Turn Minecraft into a dynamic advancement challenge! Players get random goals, track progress on a scoreboard, and compete to complete all challenges.
body:
## Description:
ChallengeAdvancements turns Minecraft into a dynamic advancement challenge! Players get randomly assigned Advancements as goals, track progress on a sidebar scoreboard, and see the current target via a BossBar. Complete all challenges to trigger fireworks, sounds, and spectator mode!

## Features:

- Random Advancements as active goals
- BossBar showing the current target (time-free)
- ActionBar timer showing elapsed challenge time
- Automatic reset of other Advancements, keeping only the current target
- Sidebar scoreboard showing completed vs. remaining Advancements
- Commands: /challenge start | pause | reset | resume
- Persistent progress stored in YAML files
- Automatically recognizes new Advancements in future Minecraft versions (1.17+ recommended)

## Compatibility:

- optimized for 1.21x
- May not fully work on 1.16 or older due to Adventure API features
